---
title: "TRIPOD-AI checklist (prediction model)"
---

Applies to the secondary prediction-model analyses (notebooks
`05_prediction_model.ipynb`, `16_clinical_nomogram.ipynb`,
`20_causal_uplift_who_benefits.ipynb`).

(Stub — to be filled in if the prediction model is retained in the final
manuscript. If the model AUC stays at ~0.57 we recommend reporting it as
a negative methodological finding rather than as a clinical tool.)
